name: skill-arsenal
description: A curated collection of reusable Claude skills organized by category

plugins.name: adversarial-review
plugins.description: Adversarial code review that breaks the self-review monoculture. Three hostile personas (Saboteur, New Hire, Security Auditor) — each must find at least one issue. BLOCK / CONCERNS / CLEAN verdict.

plugins.name: code-audit-planner
plugins.description: Audit a codebase across many dimensions (DRY/reuse, organization, logic errors, test quality, UX, theming, spec drift) and produce a self-contained implementation-plan folder of ordered, verifiable tasks. Plans only; never edits source.

plugins.name: task-plan-architect
plugins.description: Research a large task and produce a detailed, mapped implementation plan that a smaller model can execute without losing the big picture — the parts, how they connect, and an ordered set of self-contained tasks. Saves the plan outside the repo by default.
